name: samil-independence-screening
description: Screens audit clients against non-audit services for independence risk using supplied rules and user-provided CSVs.

interface.shortDescription: Audit and non-audit independence risk screening.
interface.longDescription: A repeatable Codex plugin for Samil PwC that turns supplied independence rules and user-provided audit/non-audit service lists into an evidence-backed triage report with bounded local learning.
defaultPrompt: Screen these audit and non-audit CSVs for independence risk using the supplied rules.
Create a repeatable independence risk report with evidence notes and learning observations.
Explain which services need additional review without making final permission claims.
